economic_notes: GBEs include Saik'uz Development Corporation, Saik'uz Yun K Ut, Tagi Resources Limited Partnership, Tin Toh Forest Products Ltd., Tin Toh Forest Products LLP, and 0944099 BC Ltd. Tagi Contracting Limited Partnership also equity accounted. Coastal Gaslink revenue of $456,998 received. Nation contingently liable for $240,000 line of credit and $100,000 lease facility on behalf of Tin Toh Forest Products LLP. Contaminated building owned by Nation with no current remediation plans.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Six GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Strong equity income of $2,813,980 from GBEs (mainly Tagi Contracting LP and Tin Toh Forest Products LLP) drove large surplus. Prior year (2020) included $1,889,719 treaty loan forgiveness recorded as revenue. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($5,427,709) + CSTC ($5,350,957) + CSFS ($528,770) + PGNAETA ($333,932) + Province of BC ($1,143,457) - noting some of these may be tribal council/health authority transfers rather than direct government; CMHC ($37,628) included in Other income. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identifiable government transfers. No formal budget presented for 2021. COVID-19 market risk disclosed.
